JSyn - Java Audio Synthesis

Current Status - http://www.softsynth.com/jsyn

  • PC: JNI and JDirect currently supported under SUN JDK and Visual J++.
  • PC: Netscape Communicator and Internet Explorer currently supported.
  • Macintosh: JNI currently supported under Metrowerks CodeWarrior
  • Macintosh: Internet Explorer and iCab browser currently supported.

Future Plans

  • Support for BeOS, Linux, SGI, on Macintosh.
  • JMSL (Java Music Specification Language) with Nick Didkovsky based on HMSL.
  • More filters, non-linear functions.
  • Non-real-time synthesis into a file.
  • CSyn unbundled for 'C' programmers.
